commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: 41. "And thou hast given mine enemies the back to me" (ver. 40). And thou hast turned mine enemies, and hast made them to be a back to me, that is, to follow me. "And Thou hast destroyed them that hate me." But such other of them as have persisted in hatred, Thou hast destroyed.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Upon me. An expression often used to denote a fight, Josue iii. 12. (Calmet)
God strengthens his servants, and weakens their enemies. (Worthington)
